open-api-settings.title: Open API Settings
open-api-settings.description: Configure the local Open API base URL and client key for this browser.
open-api-settings.base-url-hint: Leave this as the default unless you need a custom gateway or proxy.
open-api-settings.remember-me-hint: If unchecked, the key will be cleared when you close the tab.
open-api-settings.security-warning: Security Notice: Your client key is encrypted before storage, but XSS attacks can still intercept it during API requests. Keep your key secure.
open-api-settings.clear-data-confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all stored settings?
open-api-settings.data-cleared: All stored data has been cleared.
open-api-settings.test-success-validation: Connection succeeded. Authentication passed and the task endpoint responded.

image-hosting.title: Image Hosting (R2)
image-hosting.public-domain-hint: The CDN domain for accessing uploaded files. Recommended to use https:// protocol.
image-hosting.not-configured: R2 credentials should be set in .env (server-side only). Click "Test R2" to verify.

business.title: Business Inquiry
business.description: For business partnerships, enterprise solutions, or custom integrations, please reach out to us via email.

video-form.product-image-description: We recommend using AI to create your product images

display.noVideo: Select a video from your creations to play

video-form.enable-audio-tip: Enable to generate video with sound. Note that some models may have additional credit costs.
video-form.enable-bgm-tip: Add generated background music when the selected model supports it.
video-form.seed-hint: Set a fixed value (0-2147483647) to reproduce the same result, or keep number empty for a random result each time.
video-form.negative-prompt-placeholder: Describe what you do not want in the result, e.g. blurry, low quality, watermark...
video-form.keep-original-sound-tip: Preserve the uploaded video's original audio when supported.

error.image-required: Please upload an image to continue

image-form.imageSupport: Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, webp, png
image-form.paint-required: Painting on the image is required.

errors.aspectRatioOutOfRange: Image aspect ratio must be between 0.33 and 3.0. Current ratio:

image-generation-modal.pleaseDoNotLeaveDuringGeneration: Please do not leave during generation

compress-dialog.title: Compress Image

privacyPolicy.1-p: This Privacy Policy explains how Flaq AI collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our services at flaq.ai. By accessing or using Flaq AI, you agree to the terms described in this policy.
privacyPolicy.2-p: Flaq AI may collect personally identifiable information to improve our services. We also use third-party services that may collect information to help identify you.
privacyPolicy.3-h2: 2. Data Analytics and Third-Party AI Services
privacyPolicy.3-p: We use Google Analytics to collect data about your usage of our services for analytical purposes. Additionally, our AI generation features rely on third-party platforms, including but not limited to alibaba, google, bytedance, fal.ai, Kling AI, and Replicate. These external platforms may keep records of generation requests processed through their systems.
privacyPolicy.4-p: Flaq AI may use third-party code and libraries that utilize cookies. You can choose to accept or decline cookies, but declining may limit some features.
privacyPolicy.5-p: We may engage third-party companies, including AI service platforms such as fal.ai, Replicate, Kling AI, OpenAI, OpenRouter, and other third-party AI service providers, to help deliver our service, perform related tasks, or analyze usage of Flaq AI. These parties may have access to your personal information but are required to keep it confidential.
privacyPolicy.5-p-1: We may employ third-party companies and individuals for the following reasons:
privacyPolicy.5-li-2: To provide the Service on our behalf;
privacyPolicy.5-li-4: To help us analyze how our Service is used;
privacyPolicy.5-p-2: We want to inform users of this Service that these third parties have access to your personal information only to perform the tasks assigned to them on our behalf. However, they are obligated not to disclose or use the information for any other purpose.
privacyPolicy.6-p: We strive to protect your personal information using commercially acceptable means, but we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacyPolicy.7-p: Flaq AI may contain links to external sites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these external sites.
privacyPolicy.8-p: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Please review this page periodically for any changes. Updates are effective immediately upon posting.
privacyPolicy.9-p: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding our Privacy Policy, please contact us at contact@flaq.ai. Our company details are: FLAQ AI PTE. LTD., 112 ROBINSON ROAD, #03-01, ROBINSON 112, SINGAPORE. We are committed to addressing your inquiries and will strive to respond as promptly as possible.

termsConditions.1-p: Welcome to flaq.ai, an AI-powered image and video generation platform (the "Service"). By accessing or using our website at https://flaq.ai (the "Site"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions (the "Terms"). These Terms govern your use of the Site and the Service provided by flaq.ai ("we," "us," or "our"). Please read these Terms carefully before using the Service. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use the Site or the Service. For questions or concerns regarding these Terms or our products/services, please review our Privacy Policy or contact us at contact@flaq.ai.
termsConditions.2-p: To use our Service, you must be at least 18 years old or have reached the age of majority in your jurisdiction. By using the Service, you represent and warrant that you meet these eligibility requirements. If you are using the Service on behalf of a company, organization, or other entity, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms.
termsConditions.3-p: To access certain features of the Service, you may need to create an account. You agree to provide accurate, complete, and current information during registration and to update such information as needed. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and for all activities under your account, whether authorized or not. You must notify us immediately at contact@flaq.ai if you suspect any unauthorized use of your account.
termsConditions.4-p: Permitted Use: flaq.ai grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to use the Service for personal and commercial purposes, subject to these Terms. You agree not to use the Service for any unlawful or prohibited purpose.
termsConditions.5-p: Prohibited Conduct: You agree not to: (a) Generate or distribute content that is illegal, harmful, abusive, defamatory, obscene, or otherwise objectionable; (b) Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service; (c) Use automated systems, such as bots, spiders, or scrapers, to access the Site or Service; (d) Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its connected servers and networks; (e) Infringe upon the intellectual property rights of others.
termsConditions.6-p: Ownership and Responsibility: You retain ownership of any content, including images, text, or other materials, that you upload or generate using the Service ("User Content"). You are solely responsible for the User Content you create, upload, publish, or share through the Service.
termsConditions.7-p: License to flaq.ai: By submitting User Content, you grant flaq.ai a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable, and transferable license to use, reproduce, modify, distribute, and display such User Content for operating, improving, and promoting the Service.
termsConditions.8-p: Content Restrictions: You agree not to upload, generate, or share User Content that: (a) Infringes on the intellectual property rights of others; (b) Violates any applicable laws or regulations; (c) Contains malware, viruses, or other harmful code; (d) Is misleading, false, or inaccurate.
termsConditions.9-p: Flaq AI Ownership: The Service is licensed, not sold. Flaq AI and its licensors retain all ownership and intellectual property rights in the Site, Service, and Flaq AI Content (software, text, graphics, logos, etc.). We reserve all rights not expressly granted in these Terms.
termsConditions.10-p: User Feedback: Any feedback, suggestions, or ideas you provide to flaq.ai regarding the Service ("Feedback") will be the exclusive property of flaq.ai. You assign all rights in the Feedback to flaq.ai, and we may use such Feedback without compensation to you.
termsConditions.11-p: Fees: Certain features of the Service may require payment. You agree to pay all applicable fees associated with your use of the Service. flaq.ai reserves the right to modify fees or billing methods at any time upon notice to you.
termsConditions.12-p: Billing: Payments may be processed through third-party payment processors. By providing payment information, you authorize flaq.ai and its payment processors to charge the applicable fees to your payment method.
termsConditions.13-p: Credits and Usage: Flaq AI operates on a pay-as-you-go model. Credits you purchase or recharge are valid indefinitely and do not expire. You are billed based on your actual consumption, and fees may vary depending on the specific AI model used.
termsConditions.14-p: Refunds: All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated. flaq.ai may, at its sole discretion, provide refunds or credits in specific circumstances.
termsConditions.15-p: Termination by You: You may terminate your account at any time by following the instructions on the Site. Upon termination, your right to access and use the Service will cease immediately.
termsConditions.16-p: Termination by flaq.ai: flaq.ai may terminate or suspend your account or access to the Service, with or without notice, for any reason, including violation of these Terms.
termsConditions.17-p: Effect of Termination: Upon termination, all licenses granted to you under these Terms will terminate, and you must cease all use of the Service. Any accrued rights or obligations, including those related to payment and intellectual property, will survive termination.
termsConditions.18-p: Disclaimer of Warranties: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranties, express, implied, or statutory. flaq.ai does not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. To the fullest extent permitted by law, flaq.ai disclaims all warranties, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
termsConditions.19-p: Limitation of Liability: To the maximum extent permitted by law, flaq.ai will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or use, arising from your use of the Service, whether based on warranty, contract, tort, or any other legal theory, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
termsConditions.20-p: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless flaq.ai, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or expenses, including reasonable attorneys' fees, arising from your use of the Service, violation of these Terms, or infringement of any third-party intellectual property or other rights.
termsConditions.21-p: Our collection, use, and protection of personal data are governed by our Privacy Policy, available at https://flaq.ai/privacy-policy. We comply with applicable data protection laws, including but not limited to Brazil's Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), Mexico's Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares (LFPDPPP), and, where applicable, the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You agree to review our Privacy Policy to understand how we process your data.
termsConditions.22-p: flaq.ai reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated Terms on the Site or through the Service. Your continued use of the Service after the effective date of the revised Terms constitutes your acceptance of the modifications.
termsConditions.23-p: Entire Agreement: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and flaq.ai regarding the Service, superseding any prior agreements.
termsConditions.24-p: Severability: If any provision of these Terms is invalid or unenforceable, it will be enforced to the maximum extent possible, and the remaining provisions will remain in full force.
termsConditions.25-p: Waiver: The failure of flaq.ai to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not constitute a waiver of such right or provision.
termsConditions.26-p: Assignment: You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your rights and obligations hereunder without flaq.ai's prior written consent. flaq.ai may freely assign these Terms.
termsConditions.27-p: The laws of the Country, excluding its conflicts of law rules, shall govern these Terms and your use of the Service. Your use of the Service may also be subject to other local, state, national, or international laws, including but not limited to those of the United States, Brazil's Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), Mexico's Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares (LFPDPPP), and the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
termsConditions.28-p: Acceptance: By using flaq.ai, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
termsConditions.29-p: Contact Information: For questions or concerns about these Terms, please contact us at contact@flaq.ai. Our company details are: FLAQ AI PTE. LTD., 112 ROBINSON ROAD, #03-01, ROBINSON 112, SINGAPORE. We are committed to addressing your inquiries and will strive to respond as promptly as possible.

1.title: 1. Refund Eligibility
1.description: Due to our reliance on partner platforms and the significant computational costs of AI processing, refund requests must be submitted within 3 days of your purchase. Refunds are not available after this period. For more information, please contact us at contact@flaq.ai.

2.title: 2. Credit Usage Limitation
2.description: If you have already used the service's computational resources (e.g., generated AI videos or images), you are not eligible for a refund, regardless of the time since purchase. Please contact us at contact@flaq.ai for details.

3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
3.description: To request a refund, please contact our support team at contact@flaq.ai with your account details, order number, purchase date, and a detailed explanation for your request. All refund requests must be submitted within 3 days of purchase.

4.title: 4. Pay-as-you-go Service
4.description: Flaq AI operates on a pay-as-you-go model, where usage is billed based on consumption. Please note that any consumed credits or resources are non-refundable.

5.title: 5. Processing Refunds
5.description: Once we receive your refund request, our team will review it carefully and notify you of the decision. If approved, the refund will be processed to your original payment method. If you have any questions, please contact us at contact@flaq.ai.

6.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
6.description:
1. We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. 
2. Any changes will be effective immediately and reflected on this page. 
3. We recommend checking this policy periodically. 
4. For policy updates or inquiries, please contact us at contact@flaq.ai.

heading.title: Flaq SaaS Template: Free Open Source AI Generation Platform
heading.description: Build your own AI generation platform with this free template. Powered by Flaq AI's open API for image and video generation.

carousel.title: Flaq SaaS Template: AI Generation Tools
carousel.description: Explore AI generation tools powered by Flaq AI

unique-features.title: Key Features of Flaq SaaS Template
unique-features.description: A complete open source template with essential features for building your own AI generation platform.

1.title: Flaq AI Integration
1.description: Built-in integration with Flaq AI's open API for seamless image and video generation capabilities.

2.title: Multiple Types & Presets
2.description: Support for text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, and virtual try-on with built-in scene presets.

3.title: Ready-to-Deploy
3.description: Complete UI components, API integration, and deployment configuration included. Get started in minutes.

4.title: Open Source & Customizable
4.description: Fully open source with clean code structure. Easy to customize and extend for your specific needs.

use-cases.title: Use Cases for Flaq SaaS Template
use-cases.description: This open source template powered by Flaq AI is suitable for various industries, helping you quickly build your own AI generation platform.

1.title: Advertising & Branding
1.description: Brands and marketing teams can quickly create high-quality visuals, making ads more appealing and boosting brand image and market performance.

2.title: Game Development & Art Design
2.description: Game developers can generate character concepts, scene sketches, and prop designs , accelerating art development and shortening production cycles.

3.title: Artistic Creation & Visualization
3.description: Artists and designers can efficiently realize their ideas, easily generating unique, expressive works in a variety of styles.

4.title: Social Media Content Creation
4.description: Content creators can produce eye-catching images and videos for everything from stunning Instagram posts to impressive TikTok covers, enhancing engagement and reach.

exampleSection.title: Examples Generated via Flaq API
exampleSection.description: Explore what you can create with Flaq SaaS Template powered by Flaq AI. Use this template to quickly build your own platform! For the full AI generation experience, visit flaq.ai.

imageExamples.title: Image Generation Examples
imageExamples.description: See how the template handles AI image generation with various styles and prompts.

videoExamples.title: Video Generation Examples
videoExamples.description: Discover how the template transforms images and text into dynamic video content.

1.question: What is Flaq SaaS Template?
1.answer: Flaq SaaS Template is a free, open source template for building AI generation platforms. It integrates Flaq AI's API to provide image and video generation capabilities, helping developers quickly launch their own AI SaaS products.

2.question: What features are included in this template?
2.answer: The template includes text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, and virtual try-on generation features. It comes with complete UI components, API integration, internationalization support, and deployment configuration.

3.question: How do I get started with Flaq SaaS Template?
3.answer: Clone the repository, install dependencies, configure your Flaq API credentials, and run the development server. Detailed setup instructions are available in the README. You can also visit flaq.ai to experience the full capabilities before deploying your own instance.

4.question: Do I need to pay for using this template?
4.answer: The template itself is completely free and open source. However, you'll need Flaq API credits to generate images and videos. Visit flaq.ai to register and get API access.

5.question: Can I customize the template for my needs?
5.answer: Yes! The template is fully open source with a clean code structure. You can customize the UI, add new features, integrate additional APIs, or modify any part of the codebase to fit your specific requirements.

6.question: What tech stack does this template use?
6.answer: Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React. It uses modern web development practices and is optimized for performance and SEO.

7.question: Is commercial use allowed?
7.answer: Yes, you can use this template for commercial projects. Please check the license file for specific terms. For API usage rights and commercial generation, refer to Flaq AI's terms of service.

8.question: Where can I get support or report issues?
8.answer: Visit the GitHub repository to report issues, request features, or contribute to the project. For Flaq API related questions, contact Flaq AI support at flaq.ai.

heading.title: AI Image-to-Image Editor: Consistent Image Transformation Tool
heading.description: Transform your images into magical creations with Flaq SaaS Template Image-to-Image Converter. Advanced AI tools bring new creativity to your photos and enable stunning transformations with ease.

examples.title: Core Features of Image-to-Image Editor
examples.description: Combines multiple advanced model approaches to ensure key features and subtle details are fully preserved during image transformation.

1.title: The AI image-to-image converter enables high-quality style conversion and reconstruction while maintaining original characteristics and details.

2.title: A girl with a backpack, standing relaxed near a bookshelf and behind a chair. Keep every other detail in the scene completely unchanged.
The AI image-to-image converter supports fine-grained control of style transfer while preserving the source image's complete content.
Convert a realistic image into retro, grid-style pixel video game art.

3.title: The AI image-to-image converter preserves the original structure and layout during transformation, enabling creators to achieve more accurate composition control and generate high-quality, stable output images.

2.title: Ultra-realistic 8K overhead photo in strict knolling style. Take the object from the reference image and fully disassemble it into 8 to 12 main parts, arranging them neatly in a grid or radial layout on a minimalist wood or matte gray tabletop. Use uniform spacing and perfect alignment, no overlap or extraneous items. The scene is softly and diffusely lit by multiple light sources, casting subtle shadows and balancing neutral colors, with all elements in perfect focus. Show highly detailed real-world materials (metal, plastic, rubber grips, circuit boards, screws). For each part, add a slim white rectangular border, and place a short, clear English label next to it in a simple sans-serif font, not covering the part; annotations must be legible and not intrusive.

core-feature.title: Core Advantages of Image-to-Image Converter
core-feature.description: A professional AI image-to-image tool offering high-resolution outputs and a streamlined, user-friendly interface. Easily generate high-quality works from reference images. Diverse settings provide creative freedom, making image editing, design, and art creation more efficient and flexible.

1.title: Realistic and Delicate Visual Presentation
1.description: Outstanding in rendering textures, lighting, and composition, the system produces highly accurate, richly detailed, and realistic images for vivid results.

2.title: Highly Flexible Style Control
2.description: Customize your desired visual style freely using prompts or reference images. Whether illustration, social media, product sketch, or other visual types, achieve your vision with ease.

3.title: Powerful Text Understanding and Parsing
3.description: Leveraging advanced natural language processing, the system accurately understands prompts and descriptions to quickly generate and optimize image content for smarter, more efficient creation.

advantage.title: Applications of the AI Image-to-Image Converter
advantage.description: The AI image-to-image converter is suitable for poster design, brand marketing, product showcases, and artistic creation. It enables precise image and text control, greatly improving creative efficiency and visual quality and providing powerful creative capabilities for designers, business teams, and educators.

1.title: Poster & Visual Design
1.description: Supports poster and various creative visual editing, with flexible adjustment of fonts, sizes, and styles—perfect for event promotion and brand marketing.

2.title: Product Marketing & Brand Communication
2.description: Enables rapid generation of product visuals and creative marketing materials, saving design time, enhancing visual appeal, and boosting brand influence.

3.title: Educational Content Creation
3.description: Assists educators in creating and editing teaching visuals, making teaching resources more vivid and greatly improving presentation and effectiveness.

4.title: Artistic Creation & Cultural Innovation
4.description: Empowers artists and designers with rich creative tools for style transformation, cross-domain inspiration, and maximized artistic possibilities.

manual.title: How to Use the AI Image-to-Image Converter
manual.content: This step-by-step guide will help you get started and achieve the best results with the AI image-to-image conversion tool.

2.title: Step 2: Enter an Image Description, Choose a Size, and Refine Your Prompt as Needed

3.title: Step 3: Download and Share Your Generated Image Anytime

1.question: Can generated images be used commercially?
1.answer: Yes. Generated images can be used for commercial purposes, subject to Flaq AI's terms of service.

2.question: What Quality Do Generated Images Have?
2.answer: The AI image-to-image converter produces high-quality image outputs suitable for use directly in design or commercial scenarios.

3.question: How to Reduce Image Distortion or Flaws?
3.answer: To significantly reduce distortion or defects in generated images, it is recommended to provide as detailed and precise a description as possible. Optimizing your prompt can improve image quality.

4.question: Unique Advantages of the AI Image-to-Image Converter
4.answer: The AI image-to-image converter enables highly accurate image editing and style transfer. The platform integrates advanced models for excellent control, offering more creative freedom for professional work.

5.question: Copyright of the Generated Images
5.answer: You may edit the generated images further, but you are responsible for ensuring content compliance and for any intellectual property risks.

6.question: How to Improve Image Editing Results?
6.answer: For more accurate editing, provide clear and structured requirements. The AI models have strong image and text understanding abilities for precise execution of complex instructions.

heading.title: Flaq SaaS Template - Image to Video AI: Create Videos from Images
heading.description: Transform image into stunning video with our Image to Video AI. Create video from image with advanced AI video models.

example.title: Examples about the Image to Video AI Generator
example.description: Explore our Image to Video AI Generator examples to see how our tool converts text and images into videos.

core-feature.title: Advantages about the Image to Video AI Generator
core-feature.description: AI Video Generator not only generates content quickly but also focuses on visual hierarchy and narrative logic, making it an important productivity tool for content creators and business teams.

1.title: High-Quality Video Output
1.description: AI Video Generator produces high-quality videos with smooth motion and clear visuals, meeting professional video production standards.

2.title: Efficient Generation Process
2.description: Through optimized AI models, the generator significantly improves creative efficiency and shortens production cycles.

3.title: Natural Motion and Spatial Consistency
3.description: Character movements connect smoothly, scene transitions are seamless, both enhancing immersion and ensuring narrative continuity and logic.

advantage.title: Use Cases about the Image to Video AI Generator
advantage.description: With the Image to Video AI Generator, creators can unleash their imagination across various scenarios—from film shorts and social media content to brand advertising, educational training, and virtual reality experiences. This advanced tool can quickly transform text descriptions into high-quality, realistic and vivid video works, not only improving creative efficiency but also saving production costs, making creativity come to life faster.

1.title: Film and Video Creation
1.description: AI Video Generator can quickly transform text descriptions into cinematic short films. Whether it's dramatic segments, sci-fi scenes, or emotional narratives, it can present precise cinematography, character consistency, and style matching, significantly improving the creative efficiency of film and video content.

2.title: Marketing and Advertising Production
2.description: With AI Video Generator, brands can easily generate high-quality advertising videos, product showcases, or promotional shorts at lower costs than traditional filming while quickly iterating versions, thereby enhancing brand exposure and communication effectiveness.

3.title: Social Media Content Creation
3.description: For platforms like YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels, AI Video Generator can create attractive short videos. Combined with sound effects and visual filters, it helps creators enhance content interactivity and viral potential.

4.title: Educational and Training Videos
4.description: Teachers and training personnel can use AI Video Generator to create instructional videos, teaching demonstrations, or animated courseware. With AI-generated visuals and audio coordination, abstract or complex knowledge becomes more intuitive and easier to understand.

manual.title: How to Use the Image to Video AI Generator

1.title: Step 1: Enter Your Prompt
1.description: Enter detailed video text descriptions, including scene, characters, actions, emotions, lighting, camera angles, and other key information. The more specific the description, the better the results.

2.title: Step 2: Upload Photo
2.description: You can freely choose whether to upload an end frame

3.title: Step 3: Click Generate and Wait a Few Minutes to Get Your Described Video
3.description: Preview generated videos, supports high-resolution downloads, and share your works on social media and other platforms.

faq.title: FAQs about the Image to Video AI Generator

1.question: What is the Image to Video AI Generator?
1.answer: Image to Video AI Generator is an advanced tool that uses AI video generation technology to create high-quality videos, providing users with a seamless video creation experience.

2.question: What are the main features of the Image to Video AI Generator?
2.answer: Image to Video AI Generator has excellent video quality, user-friendly interface, and rich video creation features. Users can generate videos by customizing parameters, thereby enhancing creative expression and output effects.

3.question: How fast is the video generation process?
3.answer: Generation speed depends on the complexity and length of the video content, as well as the selected AI model.

4.question: How much does it cost to use the Image to Video AI Generator?
4.answer: Usage is billed based on the Flaq API pricing. Different video models have different costs. Please refer to flaq.ai for the latest pricing details.

5.question: How does AI Video Generator ensure high-quality output?
5.answer: AI Video Generator uses advanced AI models to ensure every frame of video is clear and detailed, outputting high-quality visual effects.

6.question: Can I use AI Video Generator for commercial purposes?
6.answer: Yes. Generated videos can be used for commercial purposes, subject to Flaq AI's terms of service.

heading.title: Flaq SaaS Template - Text to Video AI Generator with Audio
heading.description: Transform text into high-quality videos with audio support using Text to Video AI Generator. Your creativity will be presented in vivid form, and now supports generating videos with audio!

example.title: Examples for Text to Video AI Generator
example.description: Explore Text to Video AI Generator examples to see how text and images are transformed into videos.

1.prompt: A short hair beautiful European influencer is trying to sell to the camera a smooth cylindrical object, tapering slightly at one end, made of firm or flexible material with a polished, minimal design, recorded with an iPhone, smiling

2.prompt: A man soaring gracefully through outer space as the camera orbits smoothly around him

core-feature.title: Advantages about Text to Video AI Generator
core-feature.description: AI Video Generator not only generates content quickly but also focuses on visual hierarchy and narrative logic, making it an important productivity tool for content creators and business teams.

1.title: Cutting-Edge AI Technology
1.description: Based on advanced artificial intelligence models with deep semantic understanding and physics modeling capabilities, generating realistic and vivid video content from text or images.

2.title: Realistic Physics Engine
2.description: Built-in high-precision physics simulation system that accurately recreates momentum, buoyancy, and complex motion for natural and smooth dynamic effects.

3.title: High-Quality Video Output
3.description: Generates high-quality videos with smooth motion and cinematic visual quality for various creative scenarios.

advantage.title: Application Scenarios about Text to Video AI Generator
advantage.description: Text to Video AI Generator helps you quickly turn text into high-quality videos for short films, social media, marketing, training, and more—saving time and reducing costs.

1.title: Film and Video Creation
1.description: Text to Video AI Generator can rapidly transform text descriptions into cinematic short films. Whether dramatic segments, sci-fi scenes, or emotional narratives, it can precisely present cinematography, character consistency, and style matching, significantly improving film and video content creation efficiency.

2.title: Marketing and Advertising Production
2.description: Brands can leverage Text to Video AI Generator to efficiently generate advertising videos, product showcases, or promotional shorts at low cost, rapidly iterate versions, and enhance brand exposure and communication effectiveness.

3.title: Social Media Content Creation
3.description: Suitable for platforms like YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels, Text to Video AI Generator can create engaging short videos. Combined with sound effects and visual filters, it enhances content interactivity and viral potential.

4.title: Educational and Training Videos
4.description: Teachers and training personnel can use AI Video Generator to create instructional videos, demonstrations, or animated courseware. AI-generated visuals combined with audio make abstract or complex knowledge more intuitive and understandable.

manual.title: How to Use Text to Video AI Generator

1.title: Step 1: Enter Your Prompt or Upload Image
1.description: Describe your video creativity with text or upload an image you want to convert to video using AI.

2.title: Step 2: Customize Settings and Style
2.description: Select resolution, aspect ratio, and duration based on your needs.

3.title: Step 3: Generate and Download
3.description: Let AI create your video, then download in your preferred format.

faq.title: Text to Video AI Generator FAQ

1.question: What is Text to Video AI Generator?
1.answer: Text to Video AI Generator is an intelligent creation tool that uses advanced AI technology to automatically generate high-quality videos from text content, providing users with an efficient and convenient visual expression experience.

2.question: What are the main features of Text to Video AI Generator?
2.answer: Text to Video AI Generator has excellent video generation quality, intuitive operation interface, and diverse video creation functions. Users can quickly generate creative and expressive video works by simply entering text and customizing relevant parameters.

3.question: How fast is video generation?
3.answer: Generation speed varies depending on video content complexity, duration, and the selected AI model.

4.question: How much does it cost to use Text to Video AI Generator?
4.answer: Usage is billed based on the Flaq API pricing. Different video models have different costs. Please refer to flaq.ai for the latest pricing details.

5.question: How does Text to Video AI Generator ensure video quality?
5.answer: Text to Video AI Generator uses advanced AI algorithms and optimization technology to ensure generated videos have clear and detailed visual effects in every frame, presenting professional-grade output quality.

6.question: Can I use Text to Video AI Generator generated videos for commercial purposes?
6.answer: Yes. Generated videos can be used for commercial purposes, subject to Flaq AI's terms of service.

heading.title: Flaq SaaS Template - Text to Image AI Generator
heading.description: Turn your words into stunning images with advanced AI powered by Flaq API. Supports advanced models including SeeDream and Nano Banana.

examples.title: Generated Images Examples of Text to Image AI
examples.description: Text to Image AI excels in text comprehension, image generation, and creative rendering, covering the full workflow from text input to image output for diverse creative and application scenarios.

1.title: Enter product descriptions, scene details, or character features. The system will automatically interpret the semantics and generate a corresponding visual image.

2.title: The system deeply analyzes and interprets the text, outputting well-structured, detail-rich, and stylistically diverse image results.

advantage.title: Advantages of Text to Image AI
advantage.description: The core advantages of Text to Image AI lie in automating the traditionally complex, high-barrier image creation process, enabling users to rapidly obtain high-quality visual results while maintaining realism and creativity.

1.title: Efficient Generation, Greatly Saves Time
1.description: AI rapidly transforms text into images, dramatically reducing time costs for creators.

2.title: Semantic Accuracy & Detailed Realism
2.description: The generated images maintain consistency in overall composition, color, and detailed features, faithfully reproducing both meaning and fine details.

3.title: Flexible Multi-Input Adaptation
3.description: Supports natural language text inputs, platform templates, or AI auto-generated supplementary materials—catering to all levels of experience and diverse needs.

4.title: Ideal for Personal and Business Use
4.description: Whether you're a designer, content creator, product team, developer, or brand owner, easily create ready-to-use image assets for a variety of applications.

use-cases.title: Use Cases of Text to Image AI
use-cases.description: Text to Image AI is widely used for marketing visuals, brand content, product promotion, and digital creation, helping users produce visual content more efficiently and cost-effectively.

1.title: Marketing & Visual Content Production
1.description: Automatically generate ad creatives, social media assets, or poster visuals from copywriting.

2.title: Product & E-commerce Display
2.description: Create a variety of product images, scenario shots, and style visuals for product descriptions.

3.title: Design & Creative Workflow Acceleration
3.description: Quickly generate draft visuals to accelerate iteration and concept validation.

4.title: Brand & Presentation Content Generation
4.description: Produce high-quality images for websites, demo videos, or brand promotion materials.

manual.title: How to Use Text to Image AI
manual.content: Text to Image features a simple and intuitive workflow—no design experience required. Just enter your text description and the system automatically analyzes the semantics to generate the corresponding visual image.

1.title: Enter a Text Description or Use AI Prompt
1.description: Type the visual description you want, or select a platform template as your creative starting point.

2.title: AI Automatically Parses and Generates the Image
2.description: The system understands your description and maps it visually, automatically generating a high-resolution image.

3.title: Preview and Download Image
3.description: Preview results online and download popular image formats (such as PNG or JPG) for display, editing, or commercial use.

faq.title: FAQ of Text to Image AI

1.question: What are the primary uses of Text to Image AI?
1.answer: It helps users quickly convert text descriptions into images, suitable for display, design, marketing, and content creation.

2.question: Can the generated images be used for commercial purposes?
2.answer: Yes. Generated images can be used for commercial purposes, subject to Flaq AI’s terms of service.

3.question: Does Text to Image support AI auto-complete and image generation?
3.answer: Yes. The platform can use AI to automatically create visual assets based on text, streamlining your workflow.

4.question: Which formats are supported for exported images?
4.answer: Currently, popular formats like PNG, JPG, and WEBP are supported.

5.question: How much does it cost to use Text to Image AI?
5.answer: Usage is billed based on the Flaq API pricing. Different image models have different costs. Please refer to flaq.ai for the latest pricing details.

heading.title: Virtual Try On AI: Realistic Outfit Preview in Seconds
heading.description: See yourself in any outfit instantly with Virtual Try On AI. Upload a person photo and one or more clothing images, select from our ready-made style hints, and generate photorealistic try-on results powered by Flaq API—no fitting room, no guesswork.

examples.title: Core Features of Virtual Try On AI
examples.description: Virtual Try On AI accurately renders garments onto uploaded person photos, preserving body proportions, fabric texture, and design details across a wide range of clothing styles and model types.

1.title: Upload a person photo and a clothing image. The AI maps the garment onto the body with natural drape, accurate fit, and full detail preservation.

2.title: Choose from curated style hint templates to get started instantly—no sourcing required. The AI generates a complete try-on result based on your selection.

3.title: Switch between different AI models to control output style and detail level. Each model delivers consistent, high-quality virtual try-on results.

advantage.title: Core Advantages of Virtual Try On AI
advantage.description: Virtual Try On AI combines multiple state-of-the-art generation models with a simple upload workflow, making realistic outfit visualization accessible to anyone—from individual shoppers to e-commerce teams.

1.title: Fast Generation, Instant Results
1.description: Get photorealistic try-on results quickly. Our AI is pre-trained on millions of garment and body reference images, requiring no complex setup—just upload and see instant output.

2.title: Perfect Details, Precise Presentation
2.description: From delicate textures and complex patterns to tiny text and logos, every detail of the clothing is faithfully preserved in each result. The original design is fully represented—no distortions, no unexpected differences.

3.title: Unlimited Compatibility, Complete Coverage
3.description: Whether it's model photography, flat lay displays, or invisible mannequin shots, the AI handles them all without additional configuration. It adapts flexibly to diverse clothing styles, body types, and pose variations.

4.title: Multiple Models, One Platform
4.description: Switch between different AI models based on your output preference. Each model is optimized for different generation styles and clothing complexities—all accessible without any technical setup.

use-cases.title: Use Cases for Virtual Try On AI
use-cases.description: Virtual Try On AI supports a wide range of personal and professional applications—from online shopping decisions to high-volume e-commerce content production.

1.title: Online Shopping & Purchase Decisions
1.description: See exactly how a garment will look on your body before buying. Reduce return rates and purchase uncertainty by visualizing real outfit combinations on yourself.

2.title: E-commerce Product Photography
2.description: Generate on-model product visuals at scale without organizing photoshoots. Upload clothing images and instantly produce catalog-ready imagery for any body type or style.

3.title: Fashion Design & Sampling
3.description: Preview how new designs look on real body references before producing physical samples. Speed up design iteration and reduce prototyping costs across the development cycle.

4.title: Marketing & Social Media Content
4.description: Produce high-quality outfit imagery for campaigns, lookbooks, social posts, or brand promotions—without models, studios, or post-production. Generate multiple variations quickly to test different looks.

manual.title: How to Use Virtual Try On AI
manual.content: Virtual Try On AI requires no technical experience. Upload your images, select a model and style hint if needed, and receive a realistic try-on result quickly.

1.title: Step 1: Upload a Person Photo
1.description: Upload one clear photo of a person. This will serve as the base body reference for the virtual try-on.

2.title: Step 2: Add Clothing Images or Choose a Style Hint
2.description: Upload one or more clothing images (the number supported varies by model), or select from pre-built style hint templates to skip sourcing entirely.

3.title: Step 3: Select Your AI Model
3.description: Choose from available AI models. Each model offers different generation characteristics—select based on your desired output style and clothing type.

4.title: Step 4: Generate and Download
4.description: Click generate and receive your virtual try-on result. Preview the output and download it for personal use, product listings, or content creation.

faq.title: FAQs about Virtual Try On AI

1.question: What AI models are supported for Virtual Try On?
1.answer: Multiple AI models are available, each with different generation characteristics suited to different clothing types and output styles. You can select the model that best fits your use case before generating.

2.question: How many clothing images can I upload at once?
2.answer: The number of supported clothing images depends on the selected model. Some models allow multiple garment uploads in a single session. Check the model details on the generation page for the specific limit.

3.question: What are the style hint templates?
3.answer: Style hints are curated outfit references. Instead of sourcing your own clothing images, you can select a hint to guide the AI toward a specific look. They are especially useful for quick style exploration.

4.question: What types of clothing does Virtual Try On AI support?
4.answer: Most standard clothing categories are supported, including tops, bottoms, dresses, and outerwear. Swimwear and lingerie are excluded due to platform usage policies.

5.question: Does Virtual Try On AI support accessories or shoes?
5.answer: Currently, the tool focuses on clothing items. Accessories and footwear require different rendering approaches and are not part of the current feature set.

6.question: Can generated images be used for commercial purposes?
6.answer: Yes. Generated images can be used for commercial purposes, subject to Flaq AI's terms of service.

7.question: How much does it cost to use Virtual Try On AI?
7.answer: Usage is billed based on the Flaq API pricing. Different models have different costs. Please refer to flaq.ai for the latest pricing details.

8.question: What output resolution does Virtual Try On AI produce?
8.answer: Output resolution varies by model. Results are optimized for visual quality suitable for both personal styling and professional e-commerce or marketing use.
